narrative:
Mentor-On-The-Lake City 2A (precinct in Lake County) has 1,155 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
